Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing RE: PLAINTIFF LINDA CAMACHO Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Appearances (via Zoom):

William M. Pao, Esq., SETAREH LAW GROUP, (310) 888-7771, for Plaintiff.

Paul F. Sorrentino, Esq., JACKSON LEWIS P.C., (619) 573-4900, for Defendant.

Not Argued/Contested. The court acknowledges and approves the subject Motion. The court confirms with counsel that a "compliance date" will be set for Mar-28-2023. The court notes that there is no section in the proposed order that the court currently has, where the court can indicate the "compliance date" and counsel is instructed to submit a new proposed order which should include the date agreed to by counsel.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Continued To Jul-06-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Plaintiff LINDA CAMACHO's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Appearances (via Zoom):

Maxim Gorbunov, Setareh Law Group, (310) 888-7771, for Plaintiff LINDA N. CAMACHO.

Paul F. Sorrentino, JACKSON LEWIS P.C., (619) 573-4900, for Defendant
G.A.T. AIRLINE GROUD SUPPORT, INC.

The court notes the previous calling of this matter and that the parties complied with instructions to re-submit papers with original signed agreement and report from the settlement administrator, but the court did not receive courtesy copies.

Accordingly, the court is continuing this matter to Jul-06-2023 to allow the delivery of the courtesy copies as requested.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Continued To Jun-22-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jose Patino, Esq. 310-888-7771 Setareh Law Group for Plaintiff.
Paul Sorrentino, Esq. 619-573-4900 Jackson Lewis for Defendant.

Hearing is held. The Court asks for an update on case. Mr. Sorrentino updates the Court re: settlement to class and opt-out period. The Plaintiff has not signed the updated settlement. Mr. Patino argues and informs the Court the client has not signed the revised one but has signed the previous agreement. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF LINDA CAMACHO'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Tha matter is continued to June 22, 2023 at 9:30am. Parties to re-submit papers with original signed agreement and the report from the settlement administrator.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
